def negative_transaction_block_missing_rollback_on_exception():
    rule_id = "transaction_block_missing_rollback_on_exception"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Database transaction started manually without a corresponding rollback in an except or finally clause."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
